title: Richly Broiled Mexican Crustaceans Mole Poblano
description: A flexitarian-friendly Mexican dish featuring crustaceans in a rich mole poblano sauce, served in individual mini cocottes. This yeasty and crunchy dish is perfect for midnight cravings.
instructions: Preheat the broiler to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, combine mole poblano paste, ancho chili powder, garlic, and onion, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, toss the shrimp with the blended mole poblano sauce until they are well coated.
Divide the shrimp among 4 individual mini cocottes.
Drizzle the yeast and vegetable oil over the shrimp in each cocotte.
Broil the shrimp for 5 minutes or until they are pink and cooked through.
Serve the shrimp hot, garnished with additional ancho chili powder if desired.
